description: Stage 02 block batch analysis — Gemini Direct API schema (simplified for structured output compatibility)

block_analyses.description: Analysis results for each block in the batch

block_id.description: Exact block identifier from the input list

sheet.description: Sheet number from drawing stamp (logical sheet), null if not available

label.description: Short label for this block (drawing title or type)

sheet_type.description: Type of drawing sheet: schema, plan, section, detail, table, other

unreadable_text.description: True if any text is unreadable due to resolution or font issues

unreadable_details.description: Description of what is unreadable and where, if unreadable_text is true

summary.description: Concise summary of what this block shows and key observations

key_values_read.description: All key values extracted: cable specs, breaker ratings, currents, dimensions, etc.

findings.description: Audit findings identified in this block

id.description: Finding identifier in format G-NNN (e.g. G-001)

category.description: Category of finding: grounding, cable, protection, labeling, etc.

norm_quote.description: Exact quote from the normative document

block_evidence.description: What in this block supports the finding

value_found.description: Specific value or text found that is problematic
